title: Keep zone areas aligned with member components
description: Zone, boundary, and subgraph rendering no longer relocates area boxes away from the components or child zones they describe. Zone nesting remains anchored to member geometry.
decision_notes: TASK-041/TASK-042 introduced render-time area packing to avoid overlap, but same-kind zone packing could move nested zone boxes away from their member components.
Removed render-time relocation of area boxes. Area boxes now stay anchored to layout-derived member geometry; visual separation is handled by draw order and class-specific outsets.
Added a comprehensive regression that rendered zone boxes contain their member nodes and child zone boxes.
verification: dist comprehensive fixture check: outsideNodes=[] and outsideChildZones=[]
